title: Non-record: HyperparamTuned KV2 + FP16 Embed
body:
## Summary

Systematic hyperparameter optimization of the baseline 9x512 architecture with FP16 embedding export. Seven throughput-neutral changes that compound to measurable BPB improvement.

## Changes

| Parameter | Baseline | Ours |
|-----------|----------|------|
| NUM_KV_HEADS | 4 | **2** |
| MATRIX_LR | 0.04 | **0.048** |
| WARMDOWN_ITERS | 1200 | **600** |
| SCALAR_LR | 0.04 | **0.03** |
| MUON_MOMENTUM | 0.95 | **0.97** |
| QK_GAIN_INIT | 1.5 | **1.35** |
| tok_emb export | int8 | **fp16** |

## Preliminary Results

1xH100 (10 min wallclock): val_bpb = 1.3003 (baseline: 1.3106, -0.8%)

Pending 8xH100 SXM validation — applying for compute credits to run final numbers and statistical significance tests.

## Key Finding

Throughput is everything in this wallclock-capped competition. Tried SwiGLU, depth recurrence, width reinvestment, cosine warmdown — all net negative because per-step slowdown outweighed quality gains. Details in README.md.
